data.content: Approved in implementation review. Verified the async scope-refinement worker now treats normalized result events with is_error=true as failures, re-enqueues jobs when backend.get fails after dequeue, and keeps retry handling on other parse/update/agent failures. Worker tests cover successful refinement, disabled/no-agent skips, agent failure, is_error rejection, backend.get failure, unparseable output, and update failure. Sanity gates passed in work/foolery-d984: bun run lint (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
